title: Meta Rolls Out AI Business Assistant To All Advertisers, Agencies
description: The beta version of Meta AI business assistant is now rolling out to advertisers and agencies of all sizes across major global markets and languages, according to this week's announcement from the tech giant.

title: Amazon exec argues AI tools give small businesses access to ad creative once reserved for large brands
description: 74% of marketers say AI is critical to their success in the next year, up 8 points from 2024. Small businesses can now produce TV-quality ads in minutes-without agencies, crews, or big budgets.
